articles.description: Ireland keep alive their slim hopes of reclaiming the Six Nations title with a bonus-point victory over spirited Wales in Dublin.
articles.title: Ireland 27-17 Wales: Irish keep Six Nations hopes alive with bonus-point win over spirited Welsh

articles.description: BBC Sport's chief football writer Phil McNulty examines who - or what - is to blame for Spurs' crisis as they fight to avoid relegation.
articles.title: Spurs crisis - who is to blame for club's struggles?

articles.description: Head coach Brendon McCullum and director of cricket Rob Key look likely to retain the support of the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB) despite a disappointing winter.
articles.title: Brendon McCulum and Rob Key set to retain support of ECB

articles.description: World Cup co-hosts Mexico plan to deploy nearly 100,000 security personnel to protect fans at this summer's tournament, amid ongoing cartel violence in the country.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Co-hosts Mexico plan to deploy 100,000 security personnel

articles.description: Athletes from Russia and Belarus parade behind their nations' flags at the opening ceremony of the Milan-Cortina Winter Paralympics as the 50th anniversary edition of the Games officially gets under way.
articles.title: Winter Paralympics 2026: Russia and Belarus athletes parade behind national flags in opening ceremony

articles.description: Former world 100m champion Fred Kerley is banned for two years for an anti-doping whereabouts violation.
articles.title: Fred Kerley: American former world 100m champion given two-year ban

articles.description: Players have criticised the decision for a tennis tournament to be held in the UAE in the midst of Iranian attacks - including one still stranded there.
articles.title: Middle East conflict: Tennis players criticise ATP decision to start tournament in United Arab Emirates

articles.description: Aston Martin's dire start to the season has left Fernando Alonso in a "hard mental place", says team principal Adrian Newey.
articles.title: Fernando Alonso in 'hard mental place' because of Aston Martin's problems, says Adrian Newey
